projectDescription: A high-performance MCP server that indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph for AI coding agents — 158 languages, sub-millisecond queries, 99% fewer tokens, single static binary.
keyFeatures: 158 languages via vendored tree-sitter grammars — zero install, zero runtime dependencies
Hybrid LSP semantic type resolution for 11 languages (Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, Kotlin, C/C++, PHP, C#)
14 MCP tools: index, search, trace call paths, Cypher queries, architecture overview, dead code detection
Sub-millisecond graph queries and full Linux kernel (28M LOC) indexing in 3 minutes
99% token reduction vs. file-by-file grep exploration
Auto-configures 11 AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Zed, Aider, KiloCode, etc.)
Single static binary for macOS, Linux, and Windows — no Docker, no API keys
Built-in 3D interactive graph visualization at localhost:9749
Team-shared graph artifact (.codebase-memory/graph.db.zst) for collaborative indexing
Background file watcher for automatic incremental re-indexing
publicApiSurface: search_graph(name_pattern, label, file_pattern, min_degree, max_degree, limit, offset, project)
